name: HYPOPHARYNGEAL CARCINOMA
dominant_finding: invasion of retropharyngeal space with extension into oro- and nasopharynx
distribution: invasion of posterior ala of thyroid cartilage, cricothyroid space, soft tissue of neck in T4
discriminating_features: invasion of posterior ala of thyroid cartilage, cricothyroid space, soft tissue of neck in T4
difficult assessment due to varying thickness of inferior constrictor + prevertebral muscles
invasion of retropharyngeal space with extension into oro- and nasopharynx

general: invasion of posterior ala of thyroid cartilage, cricothyroid space, soft tissue of neck in T4
difficult assessment due to varying thickness of inferior constrictor + prevertebral muscles
